mapper.select: SELECT c.code, c.name, COUNT(DISTINCT sc.stock_code) AS stockCount, SUM(md.margin_balance) AS marginBalance, SUM(md.margin_change) AS marginChange, SUM(md.short_balance) AS shortBalance, SUM(md.short_change) AS shortChange, MAX(sc.snap_date) AS snapDate FROM concept c INNER JOIN stock_concept sc ON c.code = sc.concept_code AND sc.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN margin_daily md ON sc.stock_code = md.stock_code AND sc.snap_date = md.trade_date AND md.is_deleted = 0 WHERE c.is_deleted = 0 AND md.trade_date = #{tradeDate} AND md.trade_date = (SELECT MAX(trade_date) FROM margin_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0) AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') GROUP BY c.code, c.name ORDER BY ${sortBy} ${sortDir} LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FROM concept c INNER JOIN stock_concept sc ON c.code = sc.concept_code AND sc.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN margin_daily md ON sc.stock_code = md.stock_code AND sc.snap_date = md.trade_date AND md.is_deleted = 0 WHERE c.is_deleted = 0 AND md.trade_date = #{tradeDate} AND md.trade_date = (SELECT MAX(trade_date) FROM margin_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0) AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
